mapper.sql: mail_id, mail_from, mail_to, subject, context, send_date, cc, bcc, status, error_msg, file_urls, nick_name, file_list, insert_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_mail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_mail (mail_id, mail_from, mail_to, subject, context, send_date, cc, bcc, status, error_msg, file_urls, nick_name, file_list, insert_time) values (#{mailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{context,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{cc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileUrls,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fileList,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into dbo.ops_mail
mail_id,
mail_from,
mail_to,
subject,
context,
send_date,
cc,
bcc,
status,
error_msg,
file_urls,
nick_name,
file_list,
insert_time,
#{mailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{context,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{cc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fileUrls,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{fileList,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
#{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_mail
mail_id = #{record.mailId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
mail_from = #{record.mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_to = #{record.mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
subject = #{record.subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
context = #{record.context,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
send_date = #{record.sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cc = #{record.cc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bcc = #{record.bcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_msg = #{record.errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_urls = #{record.fileUrls,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nick_name = #{record.nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_list = #{record.fileList,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
insert_time = #{record.insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.ops_mail set mail_id = #{record.mailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, mail_from = #{record.mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_to = #{record.mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, subject = #{record.subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, context = #{record.context,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, send_date = #{record.sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cc = #{record.cc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bcc = #{record.bcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_msg = #{record.errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_urls = #{record.fileUrls,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{record.nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_list = #{record.fileList,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, insert_time = #{record.insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo.ops_mail
mail_from = #{mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail_to = #{mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
context = #{context,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
send_date = #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
cc = #{cc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bcc = #{bcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_urls = #{fileUrls,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
file_list = #{fileList,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
insert_time = #{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where mail_id = #{mailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_mail set mail_from = #{mailFrom,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail_to = #{mailTo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, subject = #{subject,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, context = #{context,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, send_date = #{sendDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, cc = #{cc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bcc = #{bcc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_urls = #{fileUrls,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nick_name = #{nickName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, file_list = #{fileList,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, insert_time = #{insertTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where mail_id = #{mailId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
